## 🛰️ Integration Context
**Integration Type**: [Brownfield (Modernization) / Greenfield (New-Build)]
**Hardware Target**: [e.g., Raspberry Pi 4, PLCNext, Beckhoff, etc.]
**Primary Protocol**: [e.g., EtherCAT, Modbus TCP, OPC UA]

## 🛠️ Performance & Stability
- **Deployment Success**: [Was the install deterministic? Any friction?]
- **Logic Correctness**: [Did the compiled ST behave as expected?]
- **Bumpless Transfer Needs**: [Do you require specific state-mirroring features for this system?]

## ⚠️ Brownfield Gaps / Legacy Issues
[Describe any legacy logic or hardware constraints that IronPLC/Sovridium must account for.]

## 🏁 Recommendations for "Industrial Divinity"
[How can we make this tool better for professional Systems Integration?]
